allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = sys.stdin.read\(\) lines = data.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role',''\) content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) > 10: print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:300]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, list\): for item in content: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]: {item[\\"text\\"][:300]}'\) except: pass ")
